meaning: n.软式小型飞船,肥胖的人
examples: The pressure of the helium inside a blimp is about the same as that of the air outside, so the gas does not rush out.
It is Professor Munakata's "reverse pyramid" strategy that prevents the megaliths from being dumped atop the dome of St Paul's Cathedral from a blimp.
The inner envelope filled with helium in the head section of the blimp and the third built-in airbag at the tail is filled with ethane combustible gas.
He had watched the patrol's movement via video streamed from a tethered blimp overhead.
Pirelli can't quantify the marketing value any more than Goodyear can count the revenue gain from its blimp.
